title: Excise duty forms - Canada.ca
content:
These forms are for use by persons that undertake any excise activity under the Excise Act or the Excise Act, 2001 .
- Approved formulations, denatured alcohol, and specially denatured alcohol

## Approved formulations, denatured alcohol, and specially denatured alcohol

### Licences and registrations
- L63A Application for an Alcohol Licence or Registration
- B263 Excise Duty Return – Licensed User

### Elections, applications, and waivers
- B256 Excise Act, 2001 – Application for Refund
- B268 Notification of Fiscal Months
- B269 Application or Revocation of the Authorization to File Separate Excise Duty Returns and Refund Applications for Branches or Divisions
- B284 Election or Revocation of the Election for Semi-Annual Reporting
- E680 Notice of Objection (Excise Act, 2001)
- T1095 Waiver of the Limitation Period for Assessment (subsection 191(8) of the Excise Act, 2001)
- T1097 Notice of Revocation of Waiver (Subsection 191(9) of the Excise Act, 2001)
- Y15D Request for Formula Approval

### Licences and registrations
- E110 Description of Premises to Accompany Application for Licence
- E111 Description of Vessels and Utensils
- E146 Amended Plans and Specifications
- L1 Application for a Brewer's Licence
- L902 Surety Bond for a Licensed Brewer
- L904 Surety Bond for a Manufacturer of Wort, Yeast or Malt Products
- K50B Excise Duty Return – Brewer
- RC633 Monthly Beer Revenue Worksheet
- RC634 Monthly Beer Credit Claim Worksheet

### Elections and applications
- B284 Election or Revocation of the Election for Semi-Annual Reporting
- N10 Excise Act – Application for Refund/Drawback
- RC627 Agreement Among Related or Associated Brewers for the Allocation of Production Volume Limits

### Licences and registrations
- L300 Cannabis Licence Application under the Excise Act, 2001
- L300SCHA Schedule A – Other Business Location(s) (to support a cannabis licence application)

- L301 Registration for the Cannabis Stamping Regime under the Excise Act, 2001
- L302 Surety Bond for Cannabis
- B300 Cannabis Duty and Information Return under the Excise Act, 2001

### Elections, applications, and waivers

- E680 Notice of Objection (Excise Act, 2001)
- T1095 Waiver of the Limitation Period for Assessment (subsection 191(8) of the Excise Act, 2001)
- T1097 Notice of Revocation of Waiver (Subsection 191(9) of the Excise Act, 2001)

### Licences and registrations

### Elections, applications, and waivers

- B268 Notification of Fiscal Months
